subcodes.first_line: Today, praised be God, the friends of God shine even as the morning star with the light of His love, and each is foremost among the lovers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ياران الهی مانند ستاره صبحگاهی الحمد للّه بنور محبّت اللّه روشنند و هر يک سر دفتر عاشقان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for forgiveness, @love of God
